Describe the visual sequence from the street scene to the title cards between 6 and 10 seconds.
canonical_answer: At 6s, a young male with spiked hair extends arms horizontally while text 'VICKY!' appears at the bottom; at 8s, the scene cuts to a solid black background; at 9s, text 'GETTING A HAIRCUT' displays above 'WITH' in white serif font; at 10s, 'THE FOUR' appears below in large dark grey letters.

question: Describe the stylist's actions and subtitle changes in the salon scene from 14 to 20 seconds.
canonical_answer: At 14s, a blonde stylist stands near a client in a dark cape while subtitle explains winning a concert; at 16s, the stylist begins touching the client's hair near tall 'ALCINA' cans; at 18s, the stylist continues styling while vertical blinds are visible; at 19s, subtitle changes to 'which was very well received' as spray cans are shown.
